---
title: "&#32;"
output:
  html_document:
    css: ["communityreport.css"]
params:
  community_html: NA
  map: NULL
  plot: NA
  footer_version_number: NULL
  footer_date: NULL
  footer_text: NULL
  footer_html: NULL
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r report_html, results='asis'}
shiny::HTML(params$community_html)
```

```{r map_section, echo=FALSE}
if (!(is.null(params$map) || anyNA(params$map) || length(params$map) == 0)) {
  params$map
}
```

```{r plot, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
params$plot
```

```{r footer, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
# To make footer blank (no text), pass "" for footer_text or footer_html.
EJAM:::generate_report_footer(
  footer_version_number = params$footer_version_number,
  footer_date = params$footer_date,
  footer_text = params$footer_text,
  footer_html = params$footer_html
)

```
